scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.start:backend: npm run infra:up && npm run rs:init:host && docker compose stop backend || exit 0 && cd backend && npm run start:dev
scripts.start:frontend: docker compose stop frontend || exit 0 && cd frontend && npm start
scripts.dev:backend-local: docker compose up -d frontend mongodb redis && npm run start:backend
scripts.dev:frontend-local: docker compose up -d backend mongodb redis && npm run rs:init:docker && npm run start:frontend
scripts.dev:both-local: docker compose up -d mongodb redis && npm run start:backend
scripts.build:all: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
